# LL-G Lessons Learned & Gotchas

> Machine-readable knowledge base of coding gotchas. Before scripting, load this file, then load the llms.txt for each technology you are about to use. Load only HIGH-severity entries unless a specific topic is relevant.

## Severity Legend

HIGH = silent wrong output or hard-to-debug errors -- always load these
MEDIUM = obvious failures (build errors, test failures) -- load when relevant
LOW = style/convention, caught by linter -- skip unless explicitly asked

## Technologies

### PowerShell
- [PowerShell index](kb/powershell/llms.txt): All PowerShell gotchas (11 entries)

### Next.js
- [Next.js index](kb/nextjs/llms.txt): All Next.js gotchas (3 entries)

### Tailwind CSS
- [Tailwind CSS index](kb/tailwind/llms.txt): All Tailwind CSS gotchas (3 entries)

### TypeScript
- [TypeScript index](kb/typescript/llms.txt): All TypeScript gotchas (3 entries)

### Graph API (Microsoft)
- [Graph API index](kb/graph-api/llms.txt): All Microsoft Graph API gotchas (15 entries)

### Godot / GDScript
- [Godot index](kb/godot/llms.txt): All Godot and GDScript gotchas (9 entries)

### Better Auth
- [Better Auth index](kb/better-auth/llms.txt): All Better Auth framework gotchas (5 entries)

### Bash
- [Bash index](kb/bash/llms.txt): All bash shell gotchas (2 entries)

### Teams & SharePoint
- [Teams/SharePoint index](kb/teams-sharepoint/llms.txt): Teams channel operations, file migrations, and SharePoint permissions (3 entries)

### NinjaOne
- [NinjaOne index](kb/ninjaone/llms.txt): NinjaOne API v2 and MCP tool gotchas (3 entries)
